steps.title: Substitute $x=8$
steps.content: The function is $g(x)=10x+8$. Substitute the given input: $$g(8)=10(8)+8.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The result is correct. The correct answer answers a different question, finding when the output is $8$. The other choices confuse the input or coefficient with the function value.
